companionActs.Sera_shot: Sera's arrow takes a wolf through the ribs from twenty yards. One clean shot in the firelight.
companionActs.Sera_mark: Sera calls out: "Alpha's hanging back — kill three and it will break." She nocks another arrow.
companionActs.Mira_heal: Mira pulls a wounded companion clear of the fighting. Her hands are steady even with wolves circling.
companionActs.Mira_boost: Mira throws a burning brand from the fire into the pack. The wolves scatter, momentarily blinded.
companionActs.generic_distraction: Your companion grabs a burning log and swings it. The wolves flinch from the fire.
companionActs.generic_hit: Your companion's weapon catches a wolf mid-lunge.
companionActs.generic_miss: Your companion swings at a wolf and catches nothing but cold air.
companionActs.generic_flee: Your companion drags someone clear of the pack. Wolves circle the gap.

64B_WOLVES.relentless: The alpha should have fled. It does not. It stands over a fallen pack member, fur bristling, and turns to face you. This is its pack. This is its ground. It will not leave.
64B_WOLVES.enemyHitPlayer: The wolf lunges — jaws wide, going for your sword arm. Pack instinct: disarm first, kill second.
64B_WOLVES.enemyMissPlayer: The wolf snaps and you jerk back. Its teeth close on empty air, inches from your face.

enemyHitCompanion.Aldric: A wolf gets past Aldric's guard and catches his leg. He kicks it free but the blood is immediate.
enemyHitCompanion.Sera: A wolf breaks for Sera's position. She puts an arrow in it but not before it reaches her.
enemyHitCompanion.Mira: A wolf spots Mira and lunges. She throws a burning brand in its face but takes a claw across her arm.
enemyHitCompanion.generic: The wolf turns on your companion. Jaws find a limb and close.

enemyMissCompanion.Aldric: The wolf lunges at Aldric. He catches it on his shield and throws it sideways.
enemyMissCompanion.Sera: A wolf leaps at Sera. She rolls aside and puts an arrow in it before her back hits the ground.
enemyMissCompanion.generic: The wolf snaps at your companion and gets a mouthful of cloak instead of flesh.

roundStart: The farmstead is burning. The barn is fully ablaze — screaming from inside, the kind of sound you will hear in your sleep. Three soldiers stand in formation before the house while a Bozak draconian watches the fire with the detached attention of someone checking a task off a list.

The Bozak turns to face you. It is taller than the Baaz, more intelligent, and it carries a greatsword in one hand like it weighs nothing. Its free hand crackles — spell energy gathering at its claws. Behind it, the soldiers tighten formation.
Smoke from the burning barn turns the afternoon into dusk. The soldiers advance through it in lockstep. The Bozak hangs back, preparing another spell. Do not cluster.

The farmhouse roof is catching now. The Bozak stands outlined against the flames — a silhouette of scales and sorcery. The soldiers press forward to pin you while their officer prepares the killing blow.
playerHit: Your blade finds the gap in the soldier's formation. Chain links part. He staggers.
The longsword crunches into the Bozak's scales. Harder than Baaz — thicker, darker bronze. But the blade still finds flesh.
A clean strike through the soldier's guard. The formation breaks for one critical moment.
You catch the Bozak between spells. It snarls — more annoyed than hurt — but the concentration breaks.
playerMiss: The soldiers' formation absorbs your strike. Shield catches blade, blade catches shield. They are well-drilled.
The Bozak steps back from your swing with contemptuous ease. It has been fighting longer than you have been alive.
Smoke from the burning barn blinds you at the critical moment. Your blade finds nothing.
playerCrit: The blade drives through the Bozak's guard. Dark blood sprays — thicker than human blood, steaming in the heat. The draconian actually looks surprised.
You split the formation with a strike that sends one soldier sprawling and opens a line to the Bozak behind him.
enemyBloodied: The Bozak is wounded and angry. Lightning crackles along its claws — uncontrolled, spitting sparks. A wounded spellcaster is a dangerous thing.
The formation is breaking. One soldier down, the others spreading to cover the gap. The Bozak's eyes burn with cold intelligence as it recalculates.
enemyNearDeath: The Bozak is dying on its feet. Its bones are already beginning to crack — the death throes building. When it falls, it will explode. Clear the area.
The last soldier throws down his sword. The Bozak stands alone, bleeding, crackling with failing spell energy. One more blow — but be ready for the explosion.
enemyDeath: The Bozak falls — and its bones explode outward in a burst of thunder and shrapnel. You throw yourself flat as bone fragments pepper the burning farmstead like shrapnel.
The soldier drops. The Bozak is next, its death throes detonating with a crack that shakes loose tiles from the burning farmhouse.
playerHit_scar: The Bozak's burning hands catches your shield arm. The spell-fire leaves a burn that goes deeper than skin — a mottled, waxy scar that will never fully heal.
A soldier's javelin catches your cheek. The wound is clean but deep. You will carry that line.
Lightning from the Bozak arcs across your armour. The burn pattern branches like a tree — a Lichtenberg scar, the mark of spell-fire.
playerHurt: The Bozak's burning hands spell washes over you. The heat is intense — your armour conducts it. You grit your teeth and push through.
A soldier's javelin clips your leg. The throw was precise — formation troops drill until throwing becomes reflex.
Lightning crackles from the Bozak's claw. The bolt catches your sword and the shock runs up your arm.
The soldiers press forward. A shield bash drives you back toward the burning barn.
playerHurtBad: The Bozak's lightning bolt catches you full-on. The world goes white. When your vision returns, you are on your knees and your armour is smoking.
Three soldiers and a Bozak focus you simultaneously. Formation and sorcery together — the Dragon Army's doctrine, executed perfectly.
playerDowned: The Bozak's spell catches you and the world disappears into white light and heat. When you open your eyes, the farmstead ceiling is above you — someone dragged you clear. The burning continues.

companionActs.Aldric_flank: Aldric hits the formation from the side. His shield drives a wedge between two soldiers.
companionActs.Aldric_shield: Aldric plants himself between you and the Bozak. "I'll hold it. Get the soldiers."
companionActs.Aldric_hit: Aldric's blade catches a soldier cleanly. Formation discipline wavers.
companionActs.Aldric_miss: Aldric's swing catches a raised shield. The formation holds.
companionActs.Mira_heal: Mira is already running toward the barn. Farmer Hanna needs help more than you need another sword.
companionActs.Mira_boost: Mira throws a burn salve. "The Bozak's spells — this will help with the burns."
companionActs.Sera_shot: Sera puts an arrow in the Bozak's shoulder. It turns — and Sera is already firing the second.
companionActs.Sera_mark: Sera calls: "Bozak is casting with its left. Take the arm."
companionActs.Vael_warn: Vael shouts: "Burning Hands and Lightning Bolt — do NOT cluster. Spread out!"
companionActs.generic_distraction: Your companion creates an opening in the formation.
companionActs.generic_hit: Your companion's weapon finds flesh through the formation.
companionActs.generic_miss: Your companion's strike is caught by a raised shield.
companionActs.generic_flee: Your companion breaks for the barn — someone has to save the people inside.

64E.enemyHitPlayer: The Bozak's greatsword comes down with spell-enhanced force. The ground shakes where it strikes.
64E.enemyMissPlayer: Lightning crackles toward you and you roll. The bolt scorches the earth where you were standing.

enemyHitCompanion.Aldric: The Bozak turns its burning hands on Aldric. His shield glows cherry-red but he holds.
enemyHitCompanion.Mira: A soldier breaks for Mira at the barn. She takes a hit before Aldric can intervene.
enemyHitCompanion.Sera: Lightning arcs toward Sera's position. She dives but the edge of the bolt catches her.
enemyHitCompanion.generic: The Bozak's spell catches your companion. Thunder and fire.

enemyMissCompanion.Aldric: The Bozak's lightning arcs toward Aldric. He drops behind his shield and the bolt passes overhead.
enemyMissCompanion.Sera: The Bozak fires lightning at Sera. She was already moving.
enemyMissCompanion.generic: The soldier lunges at your companion. The attack goes wide.

roundStart: The observation post is lean-to and cold fire — professional fieldcraft, invisible from the road. Two soldiers, one scout on the high rock with a longbow, and a war dog curled at his feet. The dog lifts its head. It has smelled you.
The scout reaches for his signal horn. Three seconds — that is how long you have before the bridge garrison knows you are here. The soldiers draw swords. The dog rises, hackles up, silent.
The observation post erupts. The scout fires from the rock shelf, longbow arrows arcing down. The soldiers advance in formation. The dog circles, looking for an opening to knock someone down.
The post is chaos. Rock shelf above, soldiers below, a dog that fights with pack tactics and a scout who has not missed a shot yet.
playerHit: Your blade catches the soldier mid-guard. His formation partner is too far — the tight terrain has broken their line.
The longsword finds the scout's bow arm. The longbow drops. No more arrows from above.
You catch the dog's handler. The soldier crumples and the dog hesitates — trained loyalty warring with instinct.
A solid hit on the soldier. He falls back toward the rock shelf.
playerMiss: The scout fires and you dodge — losing your swing. The longbow arrow buries itself in the ground at your feet.
The soldier catches your blade on his shield. These are not militia — they are Dragon Army regulars.
The war dog lunges and you pull back. Your strike goes wide.
Terrain. A loose rock shifts under your foot and your timing goes wrong.
playerCrit: The strike drives through the soldier's guard and drops him instantly. The scout on the rock shelf reaches for his horn — but the horn is in the hand you just rendered useless.
You catch the scout mid-draw. The longbow shatters. No signal, no arrows. The tactical situation has shifted decisively.
enemyBloodied: The scout is wounded and reaching for his signal horn with increasing desperation. Every second he cannot signal is a second bought for the bridge assault.
The soldiers are hurt but trained. They fall back toward the rock shelf, tightening their defence around the scout. Protect the signal — that is their doctrine.
enemyNearDeath: The last enemy is staggering. The signal horn lies on the rock, unused. You have held the silence.
One more hit. The scout reaches for the horn one final time. Your blade is already moving.
enemyDeath: The scout falls from the rock shelf. The signal horn tumbles from his hand and lands in the dirt, silent. The bridge garrison hears nothing. You have bought surprise.
The last soldier drops his sword. The observation post is yours. The bridge lies ahead, unsuspecting.
playerHit_scar: A longbow arrow from the rock shelf catches your arm. At this range, it goes deep. The scar will be round and puckered — a broadhead's signature.
The war dog's jaws close on your hand before you can pull away. Dog bites scar distinctively — ragged, asymmetric.
playerHurt: A longbow arrow clips your shoulder. Fired from above — the scout has the height advantage.
The war dog bowls you over. Its weight drives you into the rocks.
A soldier's javelin from the low ground. It catches your leg.
The scout fires again. Another near miss — the arrow parts your hair.
playerHurtBad: The scout puts an arrow in your side while you engage the soldiers. From the rock shelf, he has a clear shot at everything.
The dog and a soldier catch you simultaneously. Jaws and steel.
playerDowned: An arrow from above and a blade from below catch you at the same moment. You go down on the rocks. Through fading vision, you see Sera drawing on the scout — one shot to save the mission and your life.

companionActs.Sera_shot: Sera's arrow takes the scout through the bow arm. The longbow drops. No more fire from above.
companionActs.Sera_mark: Sera whispers: "Scout first. He has the horn. Kill the signal and we own this fight."
companionActs.Aldric_flank: Aldric moves right, drawing the soldiers away from the rock shelf.
companionActs.Aldric_shield: Aldric blocks the path between the soldiers and you as you climb the rock shelf.
companionActs.Aldric_hit: Aldric's blade catches a soldier. Clean, efficient.
companionActs.Aldric_miss: Aldric's swing goes wide — the terrain is treacherous.
companionActs.Serath_reveal: Serath: "Standard Dragon Army observation protocol. The scout will signal at the first sign of losing."
companionActs.generic_distraction: Your companion creates an opening. The dog turns to face the new threat.
companionActs.generic_miss: Your companion's strike goes wide on the uneven ground.

70A.enemyHitPlayer: The scout fires from the high rock — longbow, downhill, nearly point-blank.
70A.enemyMissPlayer: The arrow from above hisses past your ear. The scout nocks another — fast, professional.

enemyHitCompanion.Sera: A soldier spots Sera drawing on the scout and throws his javelin. It catches her ribs.
enemyHitCompanion.Aldric: The war dog goes for Aldric's legs. He stumbles on the rocks.
enemyHitCompanion.generic: The scout puts an arrow in your companion from the elevated position.

enemyMissCompanion.Sera: The scout fires at Sera. She is already behind cover.
enemyMissCompanion.Aldric: The dog lunges at Aldric. He sidesteps and it tumbles past.
enemyMissCompanion.generic: The arrow from above misses your companion. The scout curses.

roundStart: Fifty yards downslope, firelight through the trees. Sera is silent beside you, her mouth at your ear: "Three. Two soldiers, one scout with a longbow. The scout is the problem — she is good." The signal fire crackles between them. If that fire sends its signal, the bridge fight gets harder.

The trees are thick here and the darkness absolute beyond the firelight. The scout moves with confidence — she knows these woods. The soldiers are camped around the signal fire, alert but not alarmed. Not yet.
Combat in the forest at night. The fire throws jumping shadows that make every tree trunk look like an enemy. The scout uses the darkness like a weapon — firing from shadow, relocating, firing again.
playerHit: Your blade catches a soldier in the firelight. He stumbles back toward the signal fire.
You find the scout between arrows. The longsword opens her side and she falls back into the trees.
A clean strike in the shifting light. The soldier's guard breaks.
Steel meets flesh in the orange glow. The soldier goes down.
playerMiss: The scout fires and you dodge — your swing catches a tree trunk instead. Bark sprays.
The darkness plays tricks. You strike at a shadow that turns out to be exactly that.
The soldier uses the signal fire's half cover. Your blade rings off the stone windbreak.
playerCrit: You catch the scout mid-draw. The strike disarms her and the longbow clatters into the underbrush. No more arrows.
The blade drives through the soldier's guard in the firelight. He drops and the signal fire is undefended.
enemyBloodied: The scout is wounded and retreating deeper into the trees. If she reaches the ridge, she can signal by other means.
A soldier goes down near the fire. The remaining enemies are reconsidering their position.
enemyNearDeath: The scout is cornered. No arrows, no escape route, no signal sent. She is reaching for her shortsword with her off hand.
The last enemy stands between you and the signal fire. One more blow.
enemyDeath: The scout falls in the underbrush. The signal fire crackles on, unattended — but unsent. The bridge does not know.
The last soldier drops beside the signal fire. The forest goes quiet except for the crackle of flames that will tell no one anything.
playerHit_scar: The scout's arrow catches your face in the darkness. A line opens from temple to jaw — she is very, very good.
A soldier's desperate swing catches your forearm. In the firelight, you can see the bone.
playerHurt: An arrow from the darkness. The scout fires and relocates before you can track the source.
A soldier catches you with a shield bash by the fire. You stumble over the stone windbreak.
The scout's arrow clips your shoulder. Fired from shadow — you never saw it coming.
A branch catches your foot as you pursue and a soldier capitalises. His blade finds a gap.
playerHurtBad: The scout puts an arrow in your side from the darkness. You did not see the shot. You just felt it arrive.
Two soldiers corner you against the stone windbreak. Shield and blade, firelight and blood.
playerDowned: An arrow from the dark woods — the scout's final shot. You go down near the signal fire, its heat on your face. Sera's voice, sharp and close: "I have the scout. Stay down."

companionActs.Sera_shot: Sera fires from the tree line. Her arrow takes the scout's bow from her hands. "She's mine."
companionActs.Sera_mark: Sera: "I'll take the scout. You deal with the soldiers. Quick and quiet."
companionActs.Sera_hit: Sera's arrow finds a soldier by the fire. He drops without a sound.
companionActs.Sera_miss: Sera's arrow buries itself in a tree trunk. "Wind," she mutters, already nocking.
companionActs.generic_distraction: Your companion throws a rock into the underbrush. The scout turns toward the sound.
companionActs.generic_hit: Your companion's weapon finds its mark in the firelight.
companionActs.generic_miss: Your companion's strike misses in the darkness.

70C_SCOUTS.enemyHitPlayer: The scout fires from shadow — no warning, no sound, just the arrow arriving.
70C_SCOUTS.enemyMissPlayer: An arrow hisses past from the trees. The scout is repositioning already.

enemyHitCompanion.Sera: The scout spots Sera and fires. Two archers duelling in the dark. Sera takes an arrow in the shoulder.
enemyHitCompanion.generic: A soldier catches your companion in the shifting firelight.

enemyMissCompanion.Sera: The scout fires at Sera. The arrow passes through the space Sera was in a moment ago. She is better at this game.
enemyMissCompanion.generic: The soldier's swing misses your companion in the dark.

F1_TAVERN_SWORD.setting: The yard behind the tavern. Packed earth, a broken fence, lantern light from the doorway. Bren rolls his shoulders and grins.
F1_TAVERN_SWORD.stakes: A sparring match — non-lethal, but Bren fights like it's real. He has nothing to prove to you. You have everything to learn from him.

rounds.1: Bren opens with a feint you've never seen in any Solamnic manual. Dirt at your eyes, a quick step left, the blade coming from underneath.
rounds.2: He's fast. Faster than his build suggests. Every move is efficient — no flourish, no wasted motion. This is how people fight when losing means dying.
rounds.3: You're adapting. The forms still work — Bren can't get past Resolve — but he's making you work for every parry.
rounds.4: Bren is breathing hard now. So are you. The next exchange will decide it.
rounds.5: The crowd from the tavern has gathered. Someone is taking bets. Bren winks at you between strikes.

ROAD_OA2_FIGHT.setting: The village square. Drask draws a heavy axe from behind the bar. Six of his twelve men step forward — the rest melt into the alleys. The villagers scatter.
ROAD_OA2_FIGHT.stakes: Drask rules this village by force. You are about to remove him by the same method. The question is what comes after.

rounds.1: Drask is disciplined — not a thug's wild swing but a soldier's measured strike. He was trained somewhere. His men fan out to flank.
rounds.2: Two of the thugs go down fast. The rest hesitate. Drask does not. He presses forward with the axe, using reach and weight.
rounds.3: The fight shifts. Drask's remaining men are falling back. He's alone in the centre, still swinging, still dangerous.
rounds.4: Drask takes a knee. Blood on his face. He looks at you — not with hatred but with the weary assessment of a man who always knew this day would come.
rounds.5: The last thug drops his weapon and runs. Drask stands alone. The village is watching.
